escalation.rationale: US military prepared ground mission to capture Iran uranium while Iran-US ceasefire talks continue amid recent US airstrikes and Iranian retaliation.

ticker_items: US military prepared Iran uranium capture mission, Trump paused operation
Iran-US deal 'never been closer' despite recent airstrikes exchange
Ukraine drones force Russia Day concert cancellation for first time
NATO develops new Europe defense plans as US reduces commitment
Ukrainian strikes hit Russian Sevastopol museum and oil refineries

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian forces targeted fuel supply infrastructure causing peninsula-wide fuel crisis.
Ukrainian forces attacked multiple bridges leading into northern Crimea
Ukrainian forces rendered the occupied port of Mariupol unusable
Ukrainian SBU security service attacked Russian sea terminal sparking fires

middle_east.description: US military struck three vessels in the Strait of Hormuz killing three Indian sailors.
IDF conducted strikes against 310 Hezbollah targets in southern Lebanon.
US strikes hit three mainly Indian-crewed merchant ships as part of Iranian port blockade
Iran launched retaliatory attacks on sites in Bahrain following US airstrikes
Iran launched retaliatory attacks on sites in Kuwait following US airstrikes
Iran launched retaliatory attacks on Bahrain following US airstrikes
Iran launched retaliatory attacks on Kuwait following US airstrikes

today.incident: Ukrainian drone strikes on Russian facilities

russia.text: Never fight Russia, never try to do so, let's live in peace
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

middle_east.text: We ended the war with Iran today
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: We Ended the War With Iran Today
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Lots of things can still go wrong with US-Iran deal to end the war
middle_east.speaker: Henry Ensher
middle_east.title: Analyst

middle_east.text: A deal with the United States to end the war in the Middle East had never been closer
middle_east.speaker: Iranian Foreign Minister
middle_east.title: Foreign Minister

observers.description: Defense Secretary John Healey resigned citing government unwillingness to increase military spending amid rising threats. His deputy also quit, creating leadership crisis during heightened tensions with Russia.

President Xi Jinping completed rare state visit to North Korea, urging closer military cooperation with Kim Jong Un. The visit signals China's effort to maintain influence over North Korea amid US tensions.
Ankara reportedly urged Syrian President not to join Israel in operations against Hezbollah, defying Trump administration plans to enlist Syrian cooperation against the group.

Bulgaria's new government banned state arms supplies to Ukraine, though commercial exports remain permitted. The move appears aimed more at domestic audiences than significantly impacting Ukrainian support.

India's foreign minister lodged strong protests with the US after American strikes killed three Indian sailors on merchant ships off Oman. The incident highlights risks to neutral shipping in the Iranian blockade.

Pakistan's Prime Minister stated that the US and Iran have agreed to wording of a deal to end their war in the Middle East. Pakistani mediators are working to finalize next steps in the peace process.

financial.notes: Russia's oil output reportedly falls to new lows amid ongoing sanctions and Ukrainian attacks on energy infrastructure.

update_log.text: Ukrainian SBU claims attack on Russian Tamanneftegaz terminal causing fires
Iran and US reportedly agreed to wording of Middle East ceasefire deal according to Pakistan PM
Russia Day concert canceled for first time in 23 years due to Ukrainian drone campaign
US military prepared ground mission to capture Iran uranium but Trump paused operation
Iran announces funeral and burial dates for deceased Supreme Leader Khamenei
Reports suggest US-Iran peace memorandum could be signed Sunday in Geneva
Ukrainian forces reportedly attack all bridges leading to northern Crimea
US strikes on Iranian-linked ships off Oman kill three Indian sailors
Iran retaliates against US strikes with attacks on Bahrain and Kuwait
Trump cancelled planned Iran strikes three hours before launch, citing ongoing peace negotiations.
Ukraine struck Crimean fuel infrastructure causing peninsula-wide supply crisis.
US forces killed three Indian sailors in Strait of Hormuz vessel strikes.
